candidate_lesson: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView confirms with 0 signals, the 75% sizing multiplier should be treated as a hard gate against new entries on pairs with green_matches=0, not merely a size reduction.
testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr < 0.50: veto_entry() # require at least one historical green match before trusting 100% conviction
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
